ai_summary: This document confirms Art Nirman Limited's compliance with SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018, specifically Regulation 74(5), for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. The company's Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, MUFG Intime India, has verified that all dematerialization requests were processed correctly, including acceptance/rejection, cancellation of physical certificates, and timely updating of the register of members. No red flags or material non-compliance issues are identified, indicating sound adherence to regulatory requirements for shareholder record management.
